message:
fix(flush): handle edge cases in PendingOp::to_sql() for invalid operations

Fixes potential issues where to_sql() would generate invalid SQL for
edge cases:

- Empty pk_columns in Delete: would generate "DELETE FROM t WHERE "
- Empty pk_columns in Update: would generate "UPDATE t SET c=$1 WHERE "
- Empty set_columns in Update: would generate "UPDATE t SET  WHERE ..."
- Empty columns in Insert: would generate "INSERT INTO t () VALUES ()"

Now returns a descriptive error comment (e.g., "-- ERROR: DELETE FROM
"table" with no pk_columns") instead of invalid SQL.

Also:
- Added 4 edge case tests for invalid operations
- Clarified comment in lib.rs SQL injection test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
